title: Help me create a new quote for a client in Workroo…

messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_
Help me create a new quote for a client in WorkroomForge. john Ramos, use green tones, bed, and drapery,

I can see this beautiful bedroom! Let me analyze it and build the quote for **John Ramos** right away.

**📸 Room Analysis:**
- Elegant master bedroom with tray ceiling
- **2 windows** visible — floor-to-ceiling drapery panels with sheer underlayers
- Layered treatment: **sheer curtains + pinch pleat drape panels**
- Upholstered headboard (tufted) — candidate for reupholstery in green tones
- Bench at foot of bed — also upholstery opportunity
- Current palette: silver/grey — client wants **green tones** refresh

```tool
{"tool": "open_quote_builder", "customer_name": "John Ramos", "customer_email": "", "customer_phone": "", "customer_address": "", "project_name": "Master Bedroom — Green Tones Refresh", "rooms": [{"name": "Master Bedroom", "windows": [{"name": "Left Window", "width": 72, "height": 108, "quantity": 1, "treatmentType": "pinch-pleat", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "decorative-rod", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "wall"}, {"name": "Right Window", "width": 72, "height": 108, "quantity": 1, "treatmentType": "pinch-pleat", "liningType": "standard", "hardwareType": "decorative-rod", "motorization": "none", "mountType": "wall"}], "upholstery": [{"name": "Tufted Headboard Reupholstery", "quantity": 1}, {"name": "Bench at Foot of Bed", "quantity": 1}]}], "max_analysis": "This master bedroom is an excellent candidate for a sophisticated green tone transformation. Based on the photo, I recommend a sage or forest green velvet for the pinch-pleat drapery panels paired with ivory sheer underlayers to maintain the elegant, layered look currently in place. The tufted headboard and bench at the foot of the bed present a beautiful upholstery opportunity — a complementary emerald or hunter green in a performance fabric would tie the entire room together. Floor-to-ceiling treatments on both windows will maintain the grand proportions of this space, and decorative gold or brass hardware would beautifully accent the green palette."}
```

result.max_analysis: This master bedroom is an excellent candidate for a sophisticated green tone transformation. Based on the photo, I recommend a sage or forest green velvet for the pinch-pleat drapery panels paired with ivory sheer underlayers to maintain the elegant, layered look currently in place. The tufted headboard and bench at the foot of the bed present a beautiful upholstery opportunity — a complementary emerald or hunter green in a performance fabric would tie the entire room together. Floor-to-ceiling treatments on both windows will maintain the grand proportions of this space, and decorative gold or brass hardware would beautifully accent the green palette.
